name_cn:
Gucci Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 846705
▫️Dimensions 22.5*14*8
 The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit detail. Crafted from fine smooth leather, this bag features a structured silhouette with a 1970s-inspired half-horsebit buckle. Finished with gold-tone hardware and a three-compartment interior with a zip pocket.
